name: OceanTech Acquisitions I Corp. Class A Common Stock
summary: OceanTech Acquisitions I Corp. is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company aims to identify a target in the technology industry, particularly focusing on the ocean technology sector. OceanTech Acquisitions I Corp. is headquartered in Minneapolis, Minnesota.
